notes: Two-signal backtest (weather 45% + port 20%) on 1,795-day corridor dataset (Aug 2017 to Jun 2022). ROC AUC 0.9055. PR AUC 0.5913.
344 labeled disruption days. MBG threshold 0.0862 selected by time-blocked 5-fold CV (asymmetric Youden J). See backtest/VALIDATION.md.
Traffic signal (35% weight) excluded from backtest (NPMRDS historical archive unavailable). Validated via live GA511 deployment since Jun 2026.
Directionality: 94.7% pass rate on Paper 242 Monte Carlo outputs (N=50,000, seed 42).
GPA calibration: not connected. Port proxy uses public BTS TEU normalization.
